name: luatools
description: LuaTools Ultimate 10.2.3 — auto-update now targets your fork (Sigmachan/STLT) and is downgrade-proof: it updates only when a GitHub release is strictly newer than the running build and has an attached STLT.zip asset; older/equal/garbage tags never apply. Removed the upstream vercel proxy fallbacks that could pull a different codebase. 86 tests.
